emails.subject: Re: Kellogg's
emails.body: Re: Kellogg's The Kellogg ISDA Agreement has been signed, but it is somewhat long. Would you like me to fax it to you (if so, what is your fax no.?) or would you like me to fedex it to you?

emails.subject: Re: Kellogg's
emails.body: I am looking for the ISDA Schedule, Paragraph 11 to the Credit Support Annex and the Enron and Kellog guarantees. If at all possible, it would be ideal if you could e-mail me the execution versions of these docs. Alternatively, please fax them (my fax no. is +44 20 7783 4539). Many thanks for your help. Regards Deepak From: Tana Jones on 03/05/2000 08:41 CDT

emails.subject: Re: Kellogg's
emails.body: Tana I do not seem to have received the documentation referred to in my e-mail below. I should be grateful if you would e-mail the execution versions both to me and Michael Khajeh-Noori so that we can mirror the documentation for the purposes of negotiating a new ISDA with Kellogg's UK entity. Alternatively, if it is not possible to e-mail them, please fax them to me 44 20 7783 8171). If you have any questions, please let me know. In the meantime, many thanks for your help. Regards Deepak Forwarded by Deepak Sitlani/LON/ECT on 09/05/2000 12:42 Deepak Sitlani 03/05/2000 14:44
